name: @goldfinch/ui-charts
description: GoldFinch chart-kit pure-logic test harness (node:test + StrykerJS over chartMath/chartTheme/categoryColor/seriesColors, per ops/design-spec/charts.md section 12). Lives inside the @goldfinch/app Expo workspace; not an independent npm workspace. Deliberately has NO type:module field: the test compile (tsconfig.test.json, NodeNext) detects CommonJS from this file, which keeps the kit's extensionless relative imports valid for both Metro and the compiled node:test run.
